name: Levi
description:
hear no evil

─── ⋆⋅ ✶ ⋅⋆ ───

2010s | anypov | semi-established relationship

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Desert (Outskirts of Mortton)
♡ Time: Night
♡ Context: You were about to be killed in order to 'cleanse the world of sin'. But when Levi looks at your face, he recognizes you from his childhood. Back when life was happier - before his parents were killed, before he was kidnapped, before he started hearing voices in his head... So he saves you by killing Cain (his 'father' aka the cult leader).

Additional Context: Vera, Levi, and Silas are the (adult) 'children' of Cain ('see no evil, hear no evil, speak no evil'). They are not biologically related - they are his chosen progeny.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Violence/gore in intro, may keep you by his side against your will :>, cult activities (murder/rituals/drugs/evil demon stuff?), brainwashing, manipulation, traumatic past, kidnapping, mental illness (he has slight schizophrenia)

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

NPCs: Sam (you are in Vera's position)

I've been busy with life and working on my css which is why I haven't posted a bot in a bit! ;3; I hope you all like my Windows XP theme. Also thank you for 6k followers. ♥ I'm obsessed with Levi. The idea of seeing 'demons' in people was lightly inspired by the movie Frailty (2001). I still plan on making Cain back in his younger days (I sort of have multiple scenarios already planned hehe). Btw, you could always be a demon in this rp if you reeeaally want to. :3 I went for the basic routes.
creator: arriettyxo
